programme.title: Nanny McPhee Returns
programme.desc: Enigmatic Nanny McPhee arrives on the doorstep of a harried mother, Isabel Green, who is trying to raise her kids and tend to the family farm while her husband is away at war. Isabel has her hands full of not only her own three, but also with her sister's spoiled pair. With no time to lose, McPhee uses magic to instill in the children five important lessons.

programme.title: It's Kind of a Funny Story
programme.desc: Stressed by adolescence, 16-year-old Craig Gilner (Keir Gilchrist) checks himself into a mental-health clinic. Unfortunately, the youth wing is closed, so he must spend his mandated five-day stay with adults. programme.title: Sound of My Voice
programme.desc: California couple Peter (Christopher Denham) and Lorna (Nicole Vicius) set out to make a documentary meant to expose a charismatic cult leader named Maggie (Brit Marling) as a fraud. Maggie claims to be from the year 2054 and is seemingly allergic to almost everything in her environment; she lives in a basement, subsisting on canned oxygen, homegrown food and the blood of her acolytes. programme.title: Stonewall
programme.desc: Kicked out by his parents, a gay teenager (Jeremy Irvine) leaves small-town Indiana for New York's Greenwich Village, where growing discrimination against the LGBT community leads to riots on June 28, 1969.

programme.title: Hidden Figures
programme.desc: Three brilliant African American women at NASA, Katherine Johnson, Dorothy Vaughan and Mary Jackson, serve as the brains behind one of the greatest operations in history, the launch of astronaut John Glenn into orbit, a stunning achievement that restored the nation's confidence, turned around the Space Race and galvanized the world.

programme.title: Tyler Perry's Madea's Witness Protection
programme.desc: For years, mild-mannered Wall Street banker George Needleman (Eugene Levy) has meandered through life oblivious to his family's dysfunction and his company's malfeasance, but he's forced to wake up when he learns that he's been framed in a mob-backed Ponzi scheme. Placed under federal protection, George and his family are shipped down South to Madea's (Tyler Perry) house, where the no-nonsense mat

programme.title: Girls Trip
programme.desc: Best friends Ryan, Sasha, Lisa and Dina are in for the adventure of a lifetime when they travel to New Orleans for the annual Essence Festival. Along the way, they rekindle their sisterhood and rediscover their wild side by doing enough dancing, drinking, brawling and romancing to make the Big Easy blush.

programme.title: Going the Distance
programme.desc: Erin (Drew Barrymore) and Garrett (Justin Long) are very much in love. When Erin moves to San Francisco to finish her journalism degree and Garrett stays behind in New York to work in the music industry, they gamely keep the romance alive with webcams and frequent-flyer miles. But just when it seems the lovers will soon be reunited, they each score a big break that could separate them for good.

programme.title: Adult Best Friends
programme.desc: Katie takes her best friend, Delaney, on a nostalgic trip to their childhood hometown to tell her she's getting married. Their journey soon takes some unexpected turns courtesy of a bizarre rental homeowner, a chance encounter with a former classmate, a bachelor party, and a few potential love interests.

programme.title: King's Ransom
programme.desc: When the rich and arrogant Malcolm King (Anthony Anderson) informs his wife, Renee (Kellita Smith), that he plans to divorce her, she becomes intent on taking as much of his money as possible in the settlement. programme.title: Mickey 17
programme.desc: A disposable employee is sent on a human expedition to colonize the ice world Niflheim. After one iteration dies, a new body is regenerated with most of his memories intact.

programme.title: The Family
programme.desc: After ratting out his Mafia cohorts, Giovanni Manzoni (Robert De Niro) and his family enter the Witness Protection Program and relocate to a French town. Despite the best efforts of their handler (Tommy Lee Jones) to keep them in line, Giovanni (now called Fred Blake), his wife (Michelle Pfeiffer) and children (Dianna Agron, John D'Leo) can't help but resort to doing things the "family" way. Howev

programme.title: The Alto Knights
programme.desc: In the 1950s, notorious New York crime bosses Frank Costello and Vito Genovese vie for control of the city streets. Once the best of friends, petty jealousies and a series of betrayals place them on a deadly collision course that reshapes organized crime forever.

programme.title: Broken City
programme.desc: Former cop Billy Taggart (Mark Wahlberg) sees a chance at redemption for past sins when New York City's Mayor Nicolas Hostetler (Russell Crowe) calls on him for a special job. Hostetler thinks his wife, Cathleen (Catherine Zeta-Jones), is having an affair and that it may hurt his chances for re-election. However, a bigger scandal than expected pulls in Billy right at the start of his investigation

programme.title: Colette
programme.desc: After moving to Paris, author Sidonie-Gabrielle Colette agrees to ghostwrite a semi-autobiographical novel for her husband. Its success soon inspires her to fight for creative ownership and overcome the societal constraints of the early 20th century.

programme.title: Maze Runner: The Death Cure
programme.desc: Thomas leads some escaped Gladers on their final and most dangerous mission yet. To save their friends, they must break into the legendary Last City, a WCKD-controlled labyrinth that may turn out to be the deadliest maze of all. Anyone who makes it out alive will get answers to the questions that the Gladers have been asking since they arrived in the maze.

programme.title: Fargo
programme.desc: "Fargo" is a reality-based crime drama set in Minnesota in 1987. Jerry Lundegaard (William H. Macy) is a car salesman in Minneapolis who has gotten himself into debt and is so desperate for money that he hires two thugs (Steve Buscemi), (Peter Stormare) to kidnap his own wife. programme.title: A Hard Day's Night
programme.desc: The Beatles in their feature film debut, one of the greatest rock-and-roll comedy adventures ever. The film has a fully restored negative and digitally restored soundtrack. The film takes on the just-left-of-reality style of mock-documentary, following "a day in the life" of John, Paul, George, and Ringo as fame takes them by storm.

programme.title: The Last Emperor
programme.desc: This sweeping account of the life of Pu Yi (John Lone), the last emperor of China, follows the leader's tumultuous reign. After being captured by the Red Army as a war criminal in 1950, Pu Yi recalls his childhood from prison. programme.title: My Big Fat Greek Wedding

programme.title: The Daytrippers
programme.desc: Eliza D'Amico's seemingly idyllic marriage to Louis changes dramatically when she discovers what she believes to be a love letter to him from someone else. Going home to her family for comfort, Eliza sets out with her mother, father, sister and her sister's boyfriend in the family car to track down and confront Louis. Hummel (Ed Harris) from launching chemical weapons on Alcatraz Island into San Francisco. Gen. programme.title: Contagion
programme.desc: When Beth Emhoff returns to Minnesota from a Hong Kong business trip, she attributes the malaise she feels to jet lag. However, two days later, Beth is dead, and doctors tell her shocked husband that they have no idea what killed her. programme.title: Willy Wonka and the Chocolate Factory
programme.desc: The last of five coveted "golden tickets" falls into the hands of a sweet but very poor boy. He and his grandpa then get a tour of the strangest chocolate factory in the world. The owner leads five young winners on a thrilling and often dangerous tour of his factory.

programme.title: Robin Hood

programme.title: The Great Wall
programme.desc: When a mercenary warrior (Matt Damon) is imprisoned within the Great Wall, he discovers the mystery behind one of the greatest wonders of the world. As wave after wave of marauding beasts besiege the massive structure, his quest for fortune turns into a journey toward heroism as he joins a huge army of elite warriors to confront the unimaginable and seemingly unstoppable force.

programme.title: Snatched
programme.desc: Dumped by her boyfriend on the eve of their vacation, impetuous dreamer Emily Middleton persuades her cautious mother, Linda, to accompany her on an exotic getaway to South America. Polar opposites, Emily and Linda must soon work through their differences to escape from a wildly outrageous and dangerous jungle adventure.

programme.title: The Terminator
programme.desc: Disguised as a human, a cyborg assassin known as a Terminator (Arnold Schwarzenegger) travels from 2029 to 1984 to kill Sarah Connor (Linda Hamilton). programme.title: Sing Sing
programme.desc: A man is imprisoned at Sing Sing for a crime he didn't commit. When joined by a wary outsider, he finds purpose in staging an original comedy with a theater group of other incarcerated men.

programme.title: Room

programme.desc: A teenager (Saoirse Ronan) navigates a loving but turbulent relationship with her strong-willed mother (Laurie Metcalf) over the course of an eventful and poignant senior year of high school.

programme.title: The Watchers

programme.title: The Devil's Rejects

programme.desc: Godzilla and Anguirus fight three-headed dragon Ghidorah and huge bird Gigan at a cartoonist's theme park.

programme.desc: Japan comes under attack from two monsters in a giant monster battle between a rampaging Godzilla and the colossal genetically engineered moth called Mothra.

programme.desc: A lavish trip through Europe quickly unfolds into a race against time to solve a murder aboard a train. Michael survives many misfortunes and Vito is introduced to a life of crime.

programme.title: Flags of Our Fathers
programme.desc: In February and March 1945, U.S. troops fight and win one of the most crucial and costly battles of the war on the island of Iwo Jima. A photo of U.S. servicemen raising the flag on Mount Suribachi becomes an iconic symbol of victory to a war-weary nation. The individuals themselves become heroes, though not all survive the war and realize it.

programme.title: Snag
programme.desc: A lone wolf's quiet existence gets shattered when he learns that the woman he once loved and thought was dead is alive and being held captive by ruthless gangsters. Now, to take on this dangerous criminal organization, he must seek out allies and storm into a world of violence to rescue the love of his life.

programme.title: Failure to Launch
programme.desc: A young man (Matthew McConaughey) continues to live at the home of parents who, in desperation to push him out of the nest once and for all, hatch a plan. They hire a beautiful woman (Sarah Jessica Parker) to entice him to assume the mantle of responsibility and get his own place.

programme.title: Queen Bees
programme.desc: While her house undergoes repairs, fiercely independent senior Helen temporarily moves into a nearby retirement community, where she encounters lusty widows, cutthroat bridge tournaments and a hotbed of bullying "mean girls.".

programme.title: Old Guy
programme.desc: An aging hit man must train a young prodigy when his employer moves to replace the old guard. However, when they learn they're being betrayed, the unlikely pair turns into a lethal team -- with their double-crossing bosses in their sights.

programme.title: The Running Man
programme.desc: In the year 2019, America is a totalitarian state where the favorite television program is "The Running Man" -- a game show in which prisoners must run to freedom to avoid a brutal death. Having been made a scapegoat by the government, an imprisoned Ben Richards (Arnold Schwarzenegger) has the opportunity to make it back to the outside again by being a contestant on the deadly show, although the t

programme.title: Dinner for Schmucks
programme.desc: Tim (Paul Rudd) a rising executive, works for a boss who hosts a monthly event in which the guest who brings the biggest buffoon gets a career boost. Though he declines the invitation at first, he changes his mind when he meets Barry (Steve Carell), a man who builds dioramas using stuffed mice. The scheme backfires when Barry's blundering good intentions send Tim's life into a downward spiral, thr

programme.title: The Last Stop in Yuma County
programme.desc: Stranded at an Arizona rest stop, a traveling knife salesman gets thrust into a high-stakes hostage situation by the arrival of two bank robbers who will stop at nothing to protect their ill-begotten fortune.

programme.title: Enemy at the Gates
programme.desc: Vassili is a young Russian sharpshooter who becomes a legend when a savvy political officer makes him the hero of his propaganda campaign. Their friendship is threatened when both men fall in love with a beautiful female soldier. As the battle for the city rages, Vassili faces the ultimate challenge when the Nazi command dispatches its most elite marksman to hunt down and kill the man who has beco

programme.title: The Manchurian Candidate
programme.desc: Years after his squad was ambushed during the Gulf War, Major Ben Marco (Denzel Washington) finds himself having terrible nightmares. He begins to doubt that his fellow squad-mate Sergeant Raymond Shaw (Liev Schreiber), now a vice-presidential candidate, is the hero he remembers him being. As Marco's doubts deepen, Shaw's political power grows, and, when Marco finds a mysterious implant embedded i

programme.title: Heist 88
programme.desc: A criminal mastermind decides to pull one last job before going to prison and recruits a group of young bank employees to steal millions in a daring and brazen assault on the U.S. banking system.

programme.title: Juice
programme.desc: Four Harlem friends -- Bishop (Tupac Shakur), Q (Omar Epps), Steel (Jermaine Hopkins) and Raheem (Khalil Kain) -- dabble in petty crime, but they decide to go big by knocking off a convenience store. Bishop, the magnetic leader of the group, has the gun. But Q has different aspirations. He wants to be a DJ and happens to have a gig the night of the robbery. Unfortunately for him, Bishop isn't will

programme.title: Paid in Full
programme.desc: In the late 1980s, Ace (Wood Harris) is a young man employed by a Harlem dry cleaning shop, working hard to stay out of the drug business. While making deliveries, he meets Lulu (Esai Morales), a drug dealer who convinces Ace to join him. Ace recruits his friends Mitch (Mekhi Phifer) and Rico (Cam'ron), and the trio become major players in the Harlem drug underworld, a violent business that will t

programme.title: Virtuosity
programme.desc: A former cop who has been imprisoned for murdering the psychopath who killed his family, Parker Barnes (Denzel Washington) is recruited to test out a new virtual-reality program where the goal is to apprehend a computer-generated being called SID 6.7 (Russell Crowe), who has been modeled on hundreds of deranged criminals. When SID manages to escape into the real world, Barnes must capture or destr

programme.title: Kickback
programme.desc: A documentary following the decades-long crusade of investigative journalist Andrew Jennings to expose corruption inside FIFA, football's sole governing body and the largest sports organization in the world.

programme.title: Hard Truths
programme.desc: Pansy, angry and depressed, lashes out at family and strangers. Her constant criticism isolates her, except from her cheerful sister Chantelle, who remains sympathetic despite their differences.

programme.title: Seaside
programme.desc: A woman decides to run away to the Oregon coast with her boyfriend when he inherits a family beach house.

programme.title: Aurora: A Love Story
programme.desc: Kenny and Giselle are set to marry on a beach in Puerto Rico. Giselle disappears on the day of the ceremony, setting off a wild chain of events that unearths secrets, lies and betrayal, and threatens to destroy the fairy-tale love story.

programme.title: Stand
programme.desc: Basketball star and social justice activist Mahmoud Abdul-Rauf endures a childhood of bullying due to Tourette's syndrome and is the target of hate speech and Islamophobia during his basketball career.

programme.title: Ricky Powell: The Individualist
programme.desc: Photographer Ricky Powell captures the music, fashion and art scene in New York City in the 1980s and '90s.

programme.title: The Resurgence: DeMarcus Cousins
programme.desc: A documentary following DeMarcus Cousins while he recovers from an injury that has been a career death sentence for some NBA players; featuring exclusive interviews with teammates, coaches and NBA insiders.

programme.title: The Violent Heart
programme.desc: Long-buried secrets threaten to tear a couple apart.

programme.title: Slingshot
programme.desc: An astronaut struggles to maintain his grip on reality during a possibly compromised mission to Saturn's moon, Titan.

programme.title: Star Trek: Section 31
programme.desc: Emperor Philippa Georgiou faces the sins of her past after joining a secret division of Starfleet that's tasked with protecting the United Federation of Planets.

programme.title: All Up in the Biz
programme.desc: Celebrity interviews and rare archival footage provide insight into the life and legacy of hip-hop icon Biz Markie.

programme.title: Head of State
programme.desc: A low-level Washington, D.C., public servant, Mays Gilliam (Chris Rock), is thrust into the national spotlight when he's asked by Martin Geller (Dylan Baker), the head of the Democratic Party, to run for president after the party's presidential and vice-presidential nominees are killed in a plane crash. The odds are against Gilliam, mostly because he has a penchant for telling the truth about what

programme.title: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: The four nations of Air, Water, Earth and Fire lived in harmony until the Fire Nation declared war. A century later, there is still no end in sight to the destruction, then, an Avatar named Aang (Noah Ringer) discovers that he has the power to control the four elements. He joins forces with Katara (Nicola Peltz), a Waterbender, and her brother, Sokka, to restore balance and harmony to their world.

programme.title: Wayne's World
programme.desc: A big screen spin-off of the "Saturday Night Live" skit. Rob Lowe plays a producer that wants to take the public access "Wayne's World" to the world of commercial television. Wayne (Mike Myers) and Garth (Dana Carvey) battle to save their show and Wayne's girlfriend from Lowe.

programme.title: Uncle Buck
programme.desc: When Cindy (Elaine Bromka) and her husband, Bob (Garrett M. Brown), have to leave town for a family emergency, there is only one person available to babysit for their three kids: Bob's lazy, carefree brother, Buck (John Candy). While he immediately gets along with the two younger children (Gaby Hoffman, Macaulay Culkin), Buck must change his bachelor lifestyle if he wants to be a responsible careg

programme.title: Elf
programme.desc: Buddy (Will Ferrell) was accidentally transported to the North Pole as a toddler and raised to adulthood among Santa's elves. Unable to shake the feeling that he doesn't fit in, the adult Buddy travels to New York, in full elf uniform, in search of his real father. As it happens, this is Walter Hobbs (James Caan), a cynical businessman. After a DNA test proves this, Walter reluctantly attempts to

programme.title: Rat Race
programme.desc: In an ensemble film about easy money, greed, manipulation and bad driving, a Las Vegas casino tycoon entertains his wealthiest high rollers -- a group that will bet on anything -- by pitting six ordinary people against each other in a wild dash for $2 million jammed into a locker hundreds of miles away. The tycoon and his wealthy friends monitor each racer's every move to keep track of their favor

programme.title: Bebe's Kids
programme.desc: In this animated depiction of a calamitous first date, Robin Harris hits it off with the gorgeous Jamika, whom he meets at her boss' funeral. On the ride back, Harris is introduced to her well-behaved son, and asked if he wants to go with them to the amusement park the next day. Harris accepts, and arrives to find three more children joining them. Jamika is watching her friend Bebe's kids — which

programme.title: Hitsville: The Making of Motown
programme.desc: Motown Records becomes the most successful label of all time after its formation in 1958 Detroit amid racial tension and the burgeoning civil rights movement.

programme.title: Small Soldiers
programme.desc: When teenager Alan (Gregory Smith) buys a set of Commando Elite action figures, he's unaware that they have been programmed with military technology. The toys, including leader Chip (Tommy Lee Jones), spring to life and start taking their directives seriously, beginning by "killing" their enemies, the toy Gorgonites. But Archer (Frank Langella) and the Gorgonites won't go down without a fight. Ala

programme.title: Hotel for Dogs
programme.desc: After moving into a foster home that forbids pets, siblings Andi and Bruce must quickly find a home for their dog, Friday. The resourceful pair finds an abandoned hotel, and with the help of Bruce's mechanical skills, turn it into a pooch paradise for Friday and a number of strays. But when the inevitable barking makes neighbors suspicious, Andi and Bruce must find a way to hide their canine haven

programme.title: The Truman Show
programme.desc: He doesn't know it, but everything in Truman Burbank's (Jim Carrey) life is part of a massive TV set. Executive producer Christof (Ed Harris) orchestrates "The Truman Show," a live broadcast of Truman's every move captured by hidden cameras. Christof tries to control Truman's mind, even removing his true love, Sylvia (Natascha McElhone), from the show and replacing her with Meryl (Laura Linney). A

programme.title: Star Trek IV: The Voyage Home
programme.desc: Living in exile on the planet Vulcan, the ragtag former crew of the USS Enterprise steal a starship after receiving a planetary distress call from Earth: a space probe has entered into orbit around Earth, disabled global power on the planet and evaporated the oceans. Captain Kirk (William Shatner), Spock (Leonard Nimoy) and the rest of the officers travel back in time to retrieve now-extinct humpb

programme.title: Star Trek V: The Final Frontier
programme.desc: A renegade Vulcan makes Kirk (William Shatner), Spock (Leonard Nimoy), McCoy (DeForest Kelley) and the Enterprise go to a planet at the center of the galaxy.

programme.title: Star Trek Generations
programme.desc: In the 23rd century, the Starship Enterprise is dispatched to the scene of a giant energy field about to engulf two ships. Capt. Kirk (William Shatner) averts calamity, but is exposed to the field and presumed dead. Years later, the Enterprise's new commander, Capt. Picard (Patrick Stewart), learns that one of the disaster's survivors, Dr. Soran (Malcolm McDowell), plans to enter the field by dest

programme.title: Indiana Jones and the Kingdom of the Crystal Skull
programme.desc: It's the height of the Cold War, and famous archaeologist Indiana Jones (Harrison Ford), returning from his latest adventure, finds out his job at Marshall College is in jeopardy. He meets Mutt (Shia La Beouf), a young man who wants Indy to help him find the legendary Crystal Skull of Akator, and the pair set out for Peru. However, deadly agent Irina Spalko (Cate Blanchett) is searching for the po

programme.title: Where the Wild Things Are
programme.desc: Feeling misunderstood at home and at school, mischievous Max (Max Records) escapes to the land of the Wild Things, majestic -- and sometimes fierce -- creatures. They allow Max to become their leader, and he promises to create a kingdom where everyone will be happy. However, Max soon finds that being king is not easy and that, even being with the Wild Things, there is something missing.

programme.title: Spotlights: A Showtime Short Film Series
programme.desc: A collection of short films showcasing different themes.

programme.title: Nacho Libre
programme.desc: Ignacio (Jack Black), or Nacho to his friends, works as a cook in the Mexican monastery where he grew up. The monastery is home to a host of orphans whom Nacho cares for deeply, but there is not much money to feed them properly. Nacho decides to raise money for the children by moonlighting as a Lucha Libre wrestler with his partner Esqueleto (Héctor Jiménez), but since the church forbids Lucha, Na

programme.title: Scream
programme.desc: The sleepy little town of Woodsboro just woke up screaming. There's a killer in their midst who's seen a few too many scary movies. Suddenly nobody is safe, as the psychopath stalks victims, taunts them with trivia questions, then rips them to bloody shreds. It could be anybody...

programme.title: Faster
programme.desc: Following a 10-year prison stint, Driver (Dwayne Johnson) sprints through the gates to take vengeance on those responsible for his brother's murder. Within hours of dispatching his first one, he has two men on his tail: a veteran police officer (Billy Bob Thornton) and an eager assassin (Oliver Jackson-Cohen). Driver tries to stay a step ahead of his pursuers, but there are hints that his list is

programme.title: Fatman
programme.desc: To save his declining business, Kris Kringle, also known as Santa Claus, is forced into a partnership with the U.S. military. Making matters worse, Kris gets locked into a deadly battle of wits against a highly skilled assassin, hired by a precocious 12-year-old, after receiving a lump of coal in his stocking.

programme.title: Masterminds
programme.desc: An armored-car driver (Zach Galifianakis) helps a flirty co-worker (Kristen Wiig) and her friends pull off a heist, then finds himself holding the bag after they double-cross him.

programme.title: Buddy Games
programme.desc: After a falling out, six lifelong friends reunite to play the buddy games -- an insane competition filled with absurd physical and mental challenges. Now, all bets are off, as the determined pals fight, claw and party for the chance to win $150,000.

programme.title: Buddy Games: Spring Awakening
programme.desc: Faced with their biggest challenge yet, the gang sets out to honor a lost pal, only to find themselves in the middle of where it all began -- spring break. They soon learn their old school ways of partying can hardly compete with today's generation.

programme.title: Seven Psychopaths
programme.desc: Boozy writer Marty (Colin Farrell) is a man in search of a screenplay. He has a catchy title but no story to go along with it. Marty has a couple of oddball buddies, Hans (Christopher Walken) and Billy (Sam Rockwell), who make a living by kidnapping rich people's dogs, then returning them and collecting the reward. However this time, the fur flies when Hans and Billy kidnap the beloved pooch of a

programme.title: Masterminds
programme.desc: An armored-car driver (Zach Galifianakis) helps a flirty co-worker (Kristen Wiig) and her friends pull off a heist, then finds himself holding the bag after they double-cross him.

programme.title: The Comeback Trail
programme.desc: Indebted to a mobster, a desperate producer tries to "accidentally" kill an aging movie star for an insurance scam. However, he soon begins to realize that the film they're shooting is a masterpiece in the making.

programme.title: World Trade Center
programme.desc: Two Port Authority officers, Sgt. John McLoughlin (Nicolas Cage) and Officer Will Jimeno (Michael Peña), become trapped in the rubble of the World Trade Center after going in to help people escape from the buildings during the terrorist attacks of Sept. 11, 2001.

programme.title: The Hunt for Red October
programme.desc: Based on the popular Tom Clancy novel, this suspenseful movie tracks Soviet submarine captain Marko Ramius as he abandons his orders and heads for the east coast of the United States. Equipped with innovative stealth technology, Ramius' submarine, "Red October," is virtually invisible. However, when an American sub briefly detects the Russians' presence, CIA agent Jack Ryan sets out to determine R

programme.title: Flags of Our Fathers
programme.desc: In February and March 1945, U.S. troops fight and win one of the most crucial and costly battles of the war on the island of Iwo Jima. A photo of U.S. servicemen raising the flag on Mount Suribachi becomes an iconic symbol of victory to a war-weary nation. The individuals themselves become heroes, though not all survive the war and realize it.

programme.title: No Country for Old Men
programme.desc: While out hunting, Llewelyn Moss (Josh Brolin) finds the grisly aftermath of a drug deal. Though he knows better, he cannot resist the cash left behind and takes it with him. The hunter becomes the hunted when a merciless killer named Chigurh (Javier Bardem) picks up his trail. Also looking for Moss is Sheriff Bell (Tommy Lee Jones), an aging lawman who reflects on a changing world and a dark secr

programme.title: Most Wanted
programme.desc: An investigative reporter fights to expose the twisted truth behind a heroin bust orchestrated by dirty cops to frame an innocent man -- sentencing him to life in a Thai prison.

programme.title: The Godfather
programme.desc: Widely regarded as one of the greatest films of all time, this mob drama, based on Mario Puzo's novel of the same name, focuses on the powerful Italian-American crime family of Don Vito Corleone (Marlon Brando). When the don's youngest son, Michael (Al Pacino), reluctantly joins the Mafia, he becomes involved in the inevitable cycle of violence and betrayal. Although Michael tries to maintain a no

programme.title: Troy
programme.desc: Brad Pitt stars as legendary warrior Achilles, leading the armies of ancient Greece into battle against Troy. Sword-and-sandal epic with Eric Bana. Violent scenes.

programme.title: The Warriors
programme.desc: Wrongly accused of murder, a New York gang must fight its way back to Coney Island. Cult thriller from 48 Hrs director Walter Hill. Strong language/violence/flashing images.

programme.title: Kraven The Hunter
programme.desc: Aaron Taylor-Johnson is Kraven, the deadly supervillain on a path to become the greatest - and the most feared - hunter in the world.

programme.title: William Tell
programme.desc: The Holy Roman Empire where Europe's nations fiercely vie for supremacy and the Austrians, desiring more land, encroach upon Switzerland, a serene, pastoral nation.

programme.title: The Cinema List: Remakes
programme.desc: It's time to kick off your Sunday shoes with remakes in this edition of the Cinema List. From Footloose to The Italian Job, revisit familiar favourites with a fresh twist.

programme.title: Bloodshot
programme.desc: Action-packed superhero film starring Vin Diesel as Ray Garrison, a soldier killed in action and brought back to life as a super-human.

programme.title: Novocaine
programme.desc: When his girlfriend is kidnapped, Jack Quaid turns his inability to feel pain into his quest to rescue her. Language/violence.

programme.title: The Shadow's Edge
programme.desc: Macau Police brings the tracking expert police officer out of retirement to help catch a dangerous group of professional thieves. Starring Jackie Chan.

programme.title: Mr. Nice Guy
programme.desc: A Chinese chef accidentally gets involved with a news reporter who filmed a drug bust that went awry and is now being chased by gangs who are trying to get the videotape.

programme.title: Bad Boys II
programme.desc: Cops Will Smith and Martin Lawrence cause mayhem as they investigate a drug smuggling operation. Action. Language/violence/flashing images.

programme.title: The Meg
programme.desc: Sci-fi action with Jason Statham, who must come face to face with a shark as he helps a research team stuck at the bottom of the Pacific.

programme.title: Godzilla
programme.desc: The iconic lizard explodes onto screens as he wreaks havoc on the streets of New York. Can scientist Matthew Broderick find a way to stop the carnage.

programme.title: Fuze
programme.desc: An unexploded WWII bomb is discovered on a busy construction site in the centre of London. Chaos ensues as the military and police begin a mass evacuation.

programme.title: Venom: The Last Dance
programme.desc: Eddie and Venom, now on the run, face dangers from both worlds as the end of their symbiotic relationship grows near. Tom Hardy stars.

programme.title: Troy
programme.desc: Brad Pitt stars as legendary warrior Achilles, leading the armies of ancient Greece into battle against Troy. Sword-and-sandal epic with Eric Bana. Violent scenes.

programme.title: Mean Girls
programme.desc: A teenager is surprised when she is befriended by the girls in the most popular clique at her new school. However, a dating mishap leads to trouble and her supposed friends start to turn on her. Urged on by other pals outside their circle, the newcomer resolves to bring down the self-appointed queen of campus - only to end up adopting some of her rival's crueller characteristics. Comedy, with Lind

programme.title: Risky Business
programme.desc: An upper-class suburban teenager gets involved with a prostitute while his parents are away on holiday, turning the family home into a brothel and jeopardising his plans for the future. Coming-of-age comedy, starring Tom Cruise, Rebecca De Mornay, Bronson Pinchot and Joe Pantoliano.

programme.title: Blades of Glory
programme.desc: A bad-boy figure skater and his effeminate arch-enemy are banned from the sport after their intense rivalry results in a brawl. However, the pair find a loophole in the regulations allowing them to enter the world championships as the first ever same-sex pair - if they can put aside their differences long enough to compete. Comedy, starring Will Ferrell, Jon Heder, Will Arnett and Amy Poehler.

programme.title: Gremlins 2: The New Batch
programme.desc: Cute furball Gizmo is reunited with his human friends Billy and Kate, who now work in the New York offices of an eccentric tycoon. However, it is not long before Gizmo has spawned a new generation of murderous carnivores, who quickly overrun the building - and a genetics lab where they produce even more startling mutations. Joe Dante's comedy sequel, starring Zach Galligan, Phoebe Cates, John Glov

programme.title: The Cinema List: Risky Romance
programme.desc: From killers and zombies to forbidden love and dangerous desires, The Cinema List explores romances where passion courts danger and love is always worth the risk.

programme.title: Adult Life Skills
programme.desc: A woman returns to her home town to live in a shed belonging to her mother, who grows frustrated as her daughter regresses to childhood. A friendship develops between the directionless woman and a troubled young boy, which gives her the push she needs to develop a more independent outlook on life. Comedy, starring Jodie Whittaker and Lorraine Ashbourne.

programme.title: Blue Moon
programme.desc: Set over the course of one turbulent night in March 1943, Lorenz Hart, the waspish wordsmith responsible for The Lady Is a Tramp and My Funny Valentine, finds his life unravelling on the opening evening of his ex-partner's show, Oklahoma! Director Richard Linklater's biographical comedy drama, starring Ethan Hawke, Margaret Qualley, Bobby Cannavale and Andrew Scott.

programme.title: Caddyshack
programme.desc: A host of weird and wacky characters cause mayhem at an exclusive golf club, including a laid-back professional player, an obnoxious millionaire, the snobbish club president, a motley collection of teenage caddies and a psychotic groundskeeper engaging in a fight to the death with a canny gopher. Comedy, starring Chevy Chase, Bill Murray, Michael O'Keefe and Rodney Dangerfield.

programme.title: Police Academy 2: Their First Assignment
programme.desc: America's most inept cops graduate and are let loose on the streets - under the command of an unscrupulous lieutenant whose promotion depends on their failure. Fortunately for him, their unique brand of policing actually leads to an increase in the crime rate. Comedy sequel, starring Steve Guttenberg, Bubba Smith, David Graf and Michael Winslow.

programme.title: The Wedding Singer
programme.desc: A failed rock star carves out a career as a popular wedding singer, but his hopes for a bright future are dashed when his fiancee jilts him at the altar and he tries to shut himself off from the outside world. At one of his functions, a waitress catches his eye - but unfortunately for him, she is already engaged to someone else. Romantic comedy set in the 1980s, starring Adam Sandler and Drew Barr

programme.title: Little Fockers
programme.desc: Nurse Greg is now the proud father of twins, but has yet to earn the respect of his wife's stern father after 10 years of marriage. The couple invite both sides of their extended family to the kids' birthday party, where Greg makes a desperate effort to finally prove his worth to his father-in-law. Comedy sequel, with Ben Stiller, Robert De Niro, Owen Wilson and Dustin Hoffman.

programme.title: American Pie
programme.desc: Four teenage lads make a solemn pact to lose their virginity before the high-school prom. Though their antics cause them huge embarrassment and public humiliation, the friends also learn about love and affection in their relations with the opposite sex. Coming-of-age comedy, starring Jason Biggs, Shannon Elizabeth, Chris Klein, Alyson Hannigan, Mena Suvari, Seann William Scott and Eugene Levy.

programme.title: American Pie 2
programme.desc: The teenagers reunite after their first year at college to spend the summer at a lake house. Jim is concerned by his lack of sexual experience, and goes in search of an old flame, Oz struggles to keep a long-term relationship going, and Finch tries to master the art of tantric sex. Comedy sequel, starring Jason Biggs, Chris Klein, Seann William Scott, Alyson Hannigan and Eugene Levy.

programme.title: You've Got Mail
programme.desc: Two rivals in the bookshop business fall in love over the internet, unaware they know and dislike each other in the real world. While things remain frosty in person, the pair's anonymous online relationship continues to blossom. Romantic comedy, starring Tom Hanks, Meg Ryan, Greg Kinnear, Parker Posey and Dabney Coleman.

programme.title: Two Weeks Notice
programme.desc: An idealistic lawyer catches the attention of a real-estate tycoon, who offers her a job. She starts out thinking she can change his venal ways, but quickly tires of running his life for him. Finding himself in desperate need of her support, the self-absorbed millionaire pulls out all the stops to win her back. Romantic comedy, starring Sandra Bullock, Hugh Grant, Alicia Witt and Dana Ivey.

programme.title: Chicago
programme.desc: In 1920s Chicago, slick lawyer Richard Gere does his best to get showbiz jailbirds Catherine Zeta-Jones and Renee Zellweger off the hook. Dazzling winner of six Oscars.

programme.title: Miss You Already
programme.desc: Two best friends have their relationship tested when one of them falls ill with cancer. Drama with Toni Collette and Drew Barrymore.

programme.title: Cicada
programme.desc: As they continue to recover from separate traumatic events, two young men gradually start to fall for each other. Contains reference to child abuse.

programme.title: Boy Meets Boy
programme.desc: When two young men cross paths in Berlin, a simple afternoon in the big city soon takes on a much greater meaning. Heartfelt drama.

programme.title: A Mistake
programme.desc: Elizabeth Banks stars as a talented surgeon whose life unravels after an inexperienced colleague makes a fatal mistake. Tense medical drama.

programme.title: Burning An Illusion
programme.desc: A young British-born Black woman experiences an awakening as she navigates a relationship in Thatcher's London and begins to question everything about love and life.

programme.title: Terms Of Endearment
programme.desc: Oscar-winning tearjerker about the fraught relationship between eccentric Shirley MacLaine and headstrong daughter Debra Winger. With Jack Nicholson. Strong language/sex.

programme.title: Boyz N The Hood
programme.desc: Ice Cube and Cuba Gooding Jr star as friends fighting to survive on the mean streets of inner city LA. Hard-hitting, Oscar-nominated drama.

programme.title: A Mistake
programme.desc: Elizabeth Banks stars as a talented surgeon whose life unravels after an inexperienced colleague makes a fatal mistake. Tense medical drama.

programme.title: A Star Is Born
programme.desc: A complex love story unfolds when a musician battling his inner demons helps a struggling singer find fame. With Bradley Cooper and Lady Gaga.

programme.title: Chicago
programme.desc: In 1920s Chicago, slick lawyer Richard Gere does his best to get showbiz jailbirds Catherine Zeta-Jones and Renee Zellweger off the hook. Dazzling winner of six Oscars.

programme.title: About Time
programme.desc: On learning he can time travel, Domhnall Gleeson tries to engineer the perfect relationship with Rachel McAdams. Romance from Richard Curtis. Strong language/sex/nudity.

programme.title: Boyz N The Hood
programme.desc: Ice Cube and Cuba Gooding Jr star as friends fighting to survive on the mean streets of inner city LA. Hard-hitting, Oscar-nominated drama.

programme.title: Monster Trucks
programme.desc: Family adventure about a gas-guzzling monster that takes up residence in the truck of downtrodden high-schooler Lucas Till.

programme.title: Daddy Day Care
programme.desc: Eddie Murphy has lots of little problems as he tries to mind a classful of riotous kiddies. Hyperactive family comedy with Steve Zahn and Anjelica Huston.

programme.title: Paulie
programme.desc: A wise-cracking talking parrot sets off on a feather-brained frolic across America in search of his beloved first owner. Family fun with Gena Rowlands and Tony Shalhoub.

programme.title: Free Willy
programme.desc: A wayward orphan befriends a captive killer whale, but when danger comes calling he vows to release his new pal safely into the wild. Family drama with Michael Madsen.

programme.title: Buffalo Kids
programme.desc: Arriving in New York City in 1886, two orphaned Irish siblings embark on a wild cross-country journey aboard a transcontinental train.

programme.title: Mousehunt
programme.desc: Lee Evans and Nathan Lane are the bumbling brothers whose plans to renovate a valuable building are thwarted by a super smart rodent. Comedy with Christopher Walken.

programme.title: Zoo
programme.desc: Family drama following a group of misfit friends as they attempt to save a baby elephant during the German air raids on Belfast in 1941. With Toby Jones. Flashing images.

programme.title: Monster Trucks
programme.desc: Family adventure about a gas-guzzling monster that takes up residence in the truck of downtrodden high-schooler Lucas Till.

programme.title: The Ant Bully
programme.desc: Shrunk by the ants he tormented, Lucas must learn to work with the insects, instead of against them. Bugs bite back in this animation from the director of Jimmy Neutron.

programme.title: Pokemon Detective Pikachu
programme.desc: Ryan Reynolds voices the famous Pokémon hero as he puts his sleuthing skills to work to help a 21-year-old find his missing detective father.

programme.title: Paddington in Peru
programme.desc: Paddington, with the Brown family in tow, returns to Peru to visit his beloved Aunt Lucy, embarking on a thrilling and mysterious adventure.

programme.title: Cats & Dogs
programme.desc: Fur flies as the kung fu cats of power-hungry Mr Tinkles battle for world domination against a pack of canine commandos. Animal antics. Mild violence/flashing images.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The little blue critters find themselves hiding out in New York when evil wizard Gargamel chases them out of their village. Family fun. Flashing images.

programme.title: Karate Kid: Legends
programme.desc: Li Fong relocates to New York City and attracts unwanted attention from a local karate champion. He embarks on a journey to enter the ultimate karate competition.

programme.title: The Tuxedo
programme.desc: Jackie Chan is mistaken for a secret agent when a hi-tech tux turns him into a superspy. Jennifer Love Hewitt stars in a gadget-packed action comedy.

programme.title: Free Willy
programme.desc: A wayward orphan befriends a captive killer whale, but when danger comes calling he vows to release his new pal safely into the wild. Family drama with Michael Madsen.

programme.title: The Big Chill
programme.desc: A group of college friends gather for a weekend reunion after the funeral of one of their old classmates. Comedic cult drama with Glenn Close and Tom Berenger.

programme.title: About Last Night
programme.desc: Struggling to balance their desire for sex and love, two single guys start a courtship that questions motives. Based on David Mamet's play Sexual Perversity in Chicago.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Drunken playboy Dudley Moore stands to lose his inheritance when he falls for waitress Liza Minnelli. John Gielgud won an Oscar as his acid-tongued butler. Strong language.

programme.title: Fools Rush In
programme.desc: With cultural traditions driving a wedge between them, newly weds Alex and Isabel must find compromise to make the marriage last. Starring the late Matthew Perry.

programme.title: This Is Spinal Tap
programme.desc: Rob Reiner's mockumentary masterpiece chronicles the misadventures of a British rock band struggling to recover their former glory. With Christopher Guest and Harry Shearer.

programme.title: The First Wives Club
programme.desc: Goldie Hawn, Diane Keaton and Bette Midler take revenge on the husbands who dumped them for trophy wives. Girl power comedy with Maggie Smith and Sarah Jessica Parker.

programme.title: Fools Rush In
programme.desc: With cultural traditions driving a wedge between them, newly weds Alex and Isabel must find compromise to make the marriage last. Starring the late Matthew Perry.

programme.title: Ferris Bueller's Day Off
programme.desc: While Matthew Broderick skips school and has the day off to die for, Principal Ed Rooney tries to catch him out. Classic 80s comedy from John Hughes. Strong language.

programme.title: Ace Ventura: Pet Detective
programme.desc: Jim Carrey stars as the animal-loving private eye on the trail of a kidnapped dolphin. Riotous comedy with Courteney Cox and Sean Young. Discriminatory content.

programme.title: Ace Ventura: When Nature Calls
programme.desc: Pet detective Jim Carrey pursues a kidnapped bat through the African jungle. Madcap comedy sequel of rhinos and witch doctors, from the writer of Bruce Almighty.

programme.title: Annie
programme.desc: Classic musical about a scrappy young orphan whose life changes overnight when she is taken in by a billionaire. Starring Carol Burnett and the late Albert Finney.

programme.title: Kindergarten Cop
programme.desc: Tough cop Arnold Schwarzenegger takes on the most difficult job of his life when he goes undercover as a nursery teacher. Violence/stereo sound only.

programme.title: Naked Gun: From The Files of Police Squad!
programme.desc: Leslie Nielsen stars as incompetent cop Frank Drebin, who is out to stop a plot to assassinate the Queen. Top slapstick comedy. Flashing images.

programme.title: The Naked Gun 2 1/2: The Smell Of Fear
programme.desc: Slapstick fun as detective Leslie Nielsen stumbles upon an evil plan to destroy America. Contains strong language and flashing images.

programme.title: Naked Gun 33 1/3: The Final Insult
programme.desc: Cop Leslie Nielsen is hauled out of retirement to save the Academy Awards from bombers. Anna Nicole Smith co-stars in this sequel. Discriminatory content/flashing images.

programme.title: The Hangover Part II
programme.desc: Phil, Stu and Alan reunite in Bangkok for another stag weekend, but having learned the lessons of their previous misadventures, resolve to keep this one quiet and alcohol-free. Things inevitably do not go according to plan, and they must once again piece together the events of a wild night they cannot remember. Comedy sequel, starring Bradley Cooper, Ed Helms and Zach Galifianakis.

programme.title: The Hangover Part III
programme.desc: Drinking buddies Phil and Stu try to help their troubled friend Alan get his life in order, only to stumble into another bizarre misadventure. The Mob have taken Alan's brother hostage and to free him, they have to track down manic gangster Mr Chow, who has escaped from a Thai prison. Comedy sequel, starring Bradley Cooper, Ed Helms, Zach Galifianakis and John Goodman.

programme.title: The Hangover
programme.desc: Three men on a stag weekend in Las Vegas wake up after a night of heavy drinking and find they have not only misplaced the groom, but somehow gained a tiger and a baby. Unable to remember the details of the night before, they set about piecing the clues together in the hope of finding their missing friend. Comedy, starring Bradley Cooper, Ed Helms and Zach Galifianakis.

programme.title: Collateral
programme.desc: A cab driver realizes his current fare is a hit man that has been having him drive around from mark to mark until the last witness to a crime is dead. programme.title: Minority Report
programme.desc: Based on a story by famed science fiction writer Philip K. Dick, "Minority Report" is an action-detective thriller set in Washington D.C. in 2054, where police utilize a psychic technology to arrest and convict murderers before they commit their crime. Tom Cruise plays the head of this Precrime unit and is himself accused of the future murder of a man he hasn't even met.

With Tom's mother battling depression after the death of her husband, the young boy is left to his own devices. When Tom develops a crush on schoolmate Melissa, Pappass feels abandoned and begins behaving erratically.

programme.title: The Moon and Back
programme.desc: High school senior Lydia Gilbert feels lost after her father's death, until she discovers a space opera script written by him. Equipped with a VHS camera and pocket change, she decides to honor her dad and make the script a reality.

programme.title: The Young and Prodigious T.S. Spivet
programme.desc: T.S. is invited to the Smithsonian to receive an award for inventing a perpetual motion machine. Without telling any of his family, he boards a freight train heading to Washington, D.C., to attend the ceremony.

programme.title: Air Bound
programme.desc: A city mouse and his friends stow away on a ship headed for Dream Island, hoping to save their families from a sinister white weasel.

programme.title: Legend of Kung Fu Rabbit
programme.desc: A rabbit (Jon Heder) and a martial-arts prodigy (Rebecca Black) must save a kung-fu academy.

programme.title: Turtle Tale
programme.desc: Rafi, Hank and Goliath, a trio of talking turtles, are living the good life at a Florida animal park. But when vandals kidnap Hank, it's up to Rafi and Goliath to find their missing friend.

programme.title: Doogal
programme.desc: Florence and her animal friends live in the Enchanted Village, which is under the care of Zebedee, a kindly wizard. However, a dark cloud is approaching this sunny world. After being encased in ice for eons, Zeebad, the evil double of Zebedee, reappears and threatens to start another ice age. The only way to stop him is for Florence and friends to find three magic diamonds before he does.

programme.desc: After Kate, Humphrey, and their three pups are forced to relocate their den, they discover Amy, a friendly raptor who came to life after being uncovered during a big dig.

programme.title: Nebraska
programme.desc: Cantankerous old buzzard Woody Grant can barely walk down the street of his home in Billings, Mont., without stopping for a drink. So when Woody receives a sweepstakes notice in the mail and insists on making a 750-mile trip to Lincoln, Neb., to collect his prize, it falls to baffled son David to accompany him. programme.title: Sahara
programme.desc: Seasoned adventurer Dirk Pitt (Matthew McConaughey) sets out for the African desert with his sarcastic companion (Steve Zahn) in search of a ship rumored to have vanished long ago, the main draw being the treasure supposedly hidden within the lost vessel. programme.title: Run
programme.desc: Smugglers, the police, locals and tourists get drawn into a dangerous web of survival, sacrifice and shifting loyalties as Europe faces a surge in migration.

programme.title: We Were Soldiers
programme.desc: Based upon the best-selling book "We Were Soldiers Once ... and Young" by Lt. Gen. Harold G. Moore (Ret.) and journalist Joseph L. Galloway, this compelling war drama depicts the true story of the first major battle between the United States and North Vietnamese forces. It is a film about uncommon valor and nobility under fire, loyalty among soldiers, and the heroism and sacrifice of men and women

programme.title: Defiance
programme.desc: In 1941, Nazi soldiers are slaughtering Eastern European Jews by the thousands. Three brothers, Tuvia (Daniel Craig), Zus (Liev Schreiber) and Asael (Jamie Bell), manage to escape and take refuge in the forest where they played in childhood. programme.title: Queen of the Desert
programme.desc: Gertrude Bell's life as an explorer, cartographer, and archaeologist for the British Empire.

programme.title: Sunny Sanskari Ki Tulsi Kumari
programme.desc: After their partners, Ananya and Vikram, heartlessly dump them to marry each other, Sunny and Tulsi form an unlikely alliance. Together, they plot to gatecrash their exes' big wedding.

programme.title: Aavesham
programme.desc: Three engineering students arrive in Bangalore for their studies but soon get caught in a conflict. Struggling to handle the situation, they turn to a local gangster for help, risking everything.

programme.title: Zanjeer
programme.desc: An officer after the murder of his family seeks some answers. Where he was suspended from duty, coz of false story portrayed against him by traitors.

programme.title: Chal Chala Chal
programme.desc: Deepak tries to start a transportation service after his father receives a bus upon his retirement. However, his honest endeavour is haunted by mishaps, lack of experience and corruption.

programme.title: Lootcase
programme.desc: What will you do if you find a bag full of cash? Nandan Kumar faces a similar dilemma when a bag triggers a chain of chaos in his life.

programme.title: Bhoothnath Returns
programme.desc: Bhoothnath returns from the afterlife to contest elections, fighting corruption and inspiring change. Mixing comedy, fantasy, and social satire, it delivers a heartfelt message of honesty and hope.

programme.title: Housefull 4
programme.desc: Six lovers reincarnate after 600 years, meeting again in modern times with hilarious consequences. Mixing fantasy, comedy, and romance, it's a chaotic story of love beyond lifetimes.

programme.title: Hungama
programme.desc: A web of misunderstandings brings together quirky characters in hilarious situations. Chaos, love, and laughter define this classic Priyadarshan comedy about life's funny coincidences.

programme.title: Angrezi Medium
programme.desc: Though Champak initially disapproves, he eventually does everything in his power while going through a series of hilarious mishaps to fulfil his daughter's dream of going to London to study further.
